name: wildfire-exposure-eo alt AOI — Pedrógão Grande / Pampilhosa da Serra

properties.name: Pedrógão Grande / Pampilhosa da Serra (2017 mega-fire scar)
properties.description: Alternative pilot AOI covering the 2017 mega-fire complex — the deadly June 2017 Pedrógão Grande fire (66 fatalities) and the October 2017 Centro complex that swept Pampilhosa da Serra and Lousã. Long-term reference signal for ICNF Áreas Ardidas, dense OSM critical-infrastructure coverage validated via scripts/00_overpass_smoke.py.
properties.rationale: Strongest historical-burn signal in continental Portugal, validated infra coverage, canonical reference for Portuguese fire research. Was the original pilot before being demoted to alternative — see docs/aoi_rationale.md.
properties.source: Originally pilot.geojson; renamed per AOI freeze on 2026-05-07.
properties.provenance_note: Bbox matches the region validated in scripts/00_overpass_smoke.py (>0 power=tower features confirmed). Size exceeds 30 x 30 km spec — accepted as historical precedent.
